sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71400" key="nwta/kmwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νωτ-άκμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n71400.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with mailed back,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:294" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">294</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
